findings.impact: Funds can be withdrawn twice from the same signed authorization.
findings.rootCause: Nonce invalidation happens after the callback into user-controlled code.
findings.summary: The withdraw callback can reenter before the nonce is burned.
findings.title: Reentrant withdraw path
findings.whatGoesWrong: A malicious receiver can execute a second withdraw with the same authorization.

findings.impact: Users can observe incorrect share pricing after failed withdrawals.
findings.rootCause: The accounting accumulator updates before external transfers succeed.
findings.summary: Accounting updates can drift before the vault settles balances.
findings.title: Unchecked accounting delta
findings.whatGoesWrong: A reverting downstream path leaves the vault in an overstated state.

notes: Rebuilds should ignore pending findings in human-facing reports.
